name: Mock Chicken Loaf Florentine with Chickenless Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix thawed spinach with TVP granules and boiling water until combined.
3. Add softened tofu, salt, garlic powder, poultry seasoning, onion powder, and nutritional yeast flakes to the spinach mixture. Stir until well incorporated.
4. If using vegetable bouillon cube instead of "chicken-flavored" powder, dissolve it in hot water. Mix with oil and set aside.
5. Shape the mixture into a loaf and place on a greased baking dish.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before slicing and serving.
